content:
Developed by DigixArt Entertainment | Published under THQ Nordic#UnrealEngine | C++ | Gameplay & UI Programmer#A narrative multiplayer adventure set on a post-apocalyptic ocean world where humanity struggles to survive on floating settlements.
My Contributions:#Core programmer responsible for developing key gameplay systems such as Stealth & Chase and Carry mechanics, and for initiating the game’s unique asynchronous gameplay system. Led UI development from concept to implementation, working closely with Art and Design to faithfully translate the artistic vision into the final product. Created custom in-engine tools to improve workflow efficiency, including a JIRA-integrated bug reporting system. Where to play the game:#You can buy the game on: Steam – PlayStation – XBox.
You can try the demo on Steam.
title: TidesOfTomorrow

content:
Alien Escape!!#UnrealEngine | C++ | Team Lead & Gameplay Programmer#Led a small team to develop an isometric 3D game for our graduation project, where players control an alien escaping an abandoned laboratory.
I contributed across all areas of development, with a strong focus on the 3Cs (Character, Camera, Controls) and the design and implementation of the core object possession mechanic.
Try it on Itch.io
title: AlienEscape!

content: Brick Breaker#OpenGL | C++ | All Aspects#Implemented a Brick Breaker game using C++ and the OpenGL Graphic Library.
title: BrickBreaker

content: Third Person Shooter#UnrealEngine | C++ | Gameplay Programmer#Developed a working prototype for a third person shooter game implementing systems such as movement, weapon aiming, damage calculation and other necessary systems.
title: ThirdPersonShooter

content: Wallrun Movement Mechanic#UnrealEngine | C++ | Gameplay Programmer#Developed a 3D Character wall run movement system which enables the player to perform vertical and horizontal wallrun on adjacent walls.
title: WallrunMovementMechanic
